languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

languages.text: "Версериан, не вмешивайтесь. Уверен, если бы жизни Вольного Торговца грозила настоящая опасность, он бы не решился на подобные действия".
"Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."
languages.original_text: "Версериан, не вмешивайтесь. Уверен, если бы жизни Вольного Торговца грозила настоящая опасность, он бы не решился на подобные действия".

traits.locale_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."
"Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."
"Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

languages.text: 「ワーサーリアン、干渉しないで。もし本当に危険な状況なら、ローグトレーダーはそんなリスクを冒すだろう」
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: 「ワーサーリアン、干渉しないで。もし本当に危険な状況なら、ローグトレーダーはそんなリスクを冒すだろう。」

languages.text: « Ne vous en mêlez pas, Werserian. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} ne prendrait pas un tel risque si sa vie était réellement en danger. »
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous en mêlez pas, Werserian. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} ne prendrait pas un tel risque si sa vie était réellement en danger. »

languages.text: "Mischt Euch nicht ein, Werserian. Bestünde eine echte Gefahr, würde {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} kein solches Risiko eingehen."
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: "Mischt Euch nicht ein, Werserian. Bestünde eine echte Gefahr, würde {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} kein solches Risiko eingehen."

languages.text: "Werserian, müdahale etme. Eğer gerçek bir tehlike olsaydı Hür Tacir riske girmezdi."
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: "Werserian, müdahale etme. Eğer gerçek bir tehlike olsaydı Hür Tacir riske girmezdi."

languages.text: «Werserian, no intervenga. Si de verdad hubiese algún riesgo, {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo afrontaría sin más».
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: «Werserian, no intervenga. Si de verdad hubiese algún riesgo, {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo afrontaría sin más».

languages.text: “韦尔森，别插手。行商浪人绝不会轻易涉险。”
languages.original_text: "Werserian, do not interfere. If there was any real danger, the Rogue Trader would take such a risk."

traits.locale_text: “韦尔森，别插手。行商浪人绝不会轻易涉险。”
